summary.key_theme: 儘管 Coinbase 積極推動加密貨幣抵押貸款等創新業務並獲得分析師買入評級，但近期面臨加密市場回調、用戶資產保障爭議以及監管政策不確定性的多重壓力。

bullish.title: Goldman Sachs Maintains Buy on Coinbase Global, Lowers Price Target to $235
bullish.reason: 高盛分析師 James Yaro 維持對 Coinbase 的買入評級，儘管下調了目標價，但 235 美元的目標價仍顯示出相較於當前股價有顯著的上漲空間。

bullish.title: Fannie Mae accepts first crypto-backed mortgage product
bullish.reason: Coinbase 與 Better Home 合作推出符合 Fannie Mae 指引的加密貨幣抵押貸款，標誌著加密資產在傳統金融領域的應用取得重大突破。

bullish.title: Coinbase Integrates Chainlink to Deliver Institutional Trading Data Onchain
bullish.reason: 透過與 Chainlink 整合，Coinbase 強化了其機構級交易數據的鏈上透明度，有助於鞏固其在機構市場的競爭優勢。

bullish.title: Crypto-Backed Group Reveals First Midterm Targets. Why It Matters for Coinbase.
bullish.reason: Coinbase 支持的 Stand With Crypto 組織加強政治遊說，旨在影響中期選舉並推動有利於加密產業的法規制定。

bullish.title: Coinbase’s Top Lawyer Says Prediction Markets Aren’t Gambling—and Predicts Supreme Court Will Agree
bullish.reason: 公司首席法務官積極為預測市場辯護，試圖釐清監管邊界，若勝訴將為公司開拓新業務領域提供法律依據。

bearish.title: Coinbase Shares Slide As Crypto Market Faces Broad Sell-Off
bearish.reason: 受整體加密貨幣市場拋售潮影響，Coinbase 股價在盤前交易中下跌超過 3 %，反映出公司營收與加密市場高度相關的風險。

bearish.title: Crypto Thefts Hit $2.7 Billion as Coinbase Coverage Limits Raise Investor Questions
bearish.reason: 加密貨幣盜竊案頻發，且 Coinbase 的保險條款與用戶預期存在落差，引發市場對其平台安全保障能力的質疑。

bearish.title: Crypto Insurance Sounds Great Until You Actually Need It—Here's The Ugly Truth
bearish.reason: 報導指出 Coinbase 拒絕賠付 10 萬美元比特幣損失的案例，損害了投資人對平台資產保護機制的信任。

bearish.title: Senator Lummis Says America Can't Wait Until 2030, But Coinbase Still Blocking Stablecoin Bill
bearish.reason: Coinbase 因穩定幣收益條款問題反對 Clarity Act，導致與監管機構出現分歧，增加了未來法規環境的不確定性。

bearish.title: Coinbase Global, Inc. (COIN) Falls More Steeply Than Broader Market: What Investors Need to Know
bearish.reason: Coinbase 股價跌幅大於大盤，顯示投資人對其基本面與市場情緒的敏感度較高，短期賣壓沉重。

neutral.title: Is Coinbase Global (COIN) Pricing In Too Much Optimism After Recent Share Price Weakness
neutral.reason: 文章探討股價是否過度反映樂觀情緒，屬於市場分析觀點，對股價無直接驅動作用。

neutral.title: Had You Invested $1,000 in Coinbase or Robinhood IPOs, Here’s What You’d Have Today
neutral.reason: 回顧性投資績效分析，僅供投資人參考，不影響公司當前營運。

neutral.title: Stocks making the biggest moves premarket: AstraZeneca, Unity Software, Coinbase & more
neutral.reason: 僅為盤前波動概覽，未提供具體基本面分析。

neutral.title: Stocks making big moves this week: Shopify, Winnebago, Coinbase, STAAR Surgical, and Viavi Solutions
neutral.reason: 週度市場波動總結，屬於資訊彙整性質。

neutral.title: Coinbase Stock Is Trending As Senate Stablecoin Draft Keeps Yield Pressure In Focus
neutral.reason: 描述股價橫盤整理狀態，反映市場在等待政策進一步明朗。
